prompt: Build a hero card with title and body in a vertical stack.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", children=hero)
hero = Card(title=:hero.title, body=:hero.body)

prompt: Form-like stack with title text and submit button.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", children=title)
title = Text(text=:form.title)
submit = Button(label=:form.submit)

root = Stack(direction="horizontal", gap=12, children=left)
left = Card(title=:col.left.title, body=:col.left.body)
right = Card(title=:col.right.title, body=:col.right.body)

prompt: Use an unusually large gap between stacked cards.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", gap=64, children=a)
a = Card(title=:rare.a.title, body=:rare.a.body)
b = Card(title=:rare.b.title, body=:rare.b.body)

prompt: Dashboard-like layout with header text and two metric cards.
openui:
root = Stack(direction="vertical", children=header)
header = Text(text=:dash.header)
row = Stack(direction="horizontal", children=m1)
m1 = Card(title=:dash.m1.title, body=:dash.m1.body)
m2 = Card(title=:dash.m2.title, body=:dash.m2.body)
